objective: Consume immutable QSO-SEEKER evidence references from the Digital Consciousness Field and bind them to Experimenter outputs, citations, provenance, and review gates.
invariants: Experimenters receive bounded evidence views, never raw network payloads.
Every inference identifies supporting and contradicting record hashes.
Source authority, retrieval time, transformations, sensitivity, and uncertainty remain visible.
Contradictory evidence is preserved rather than silently merged.
No evidence-derived proposal is promoted without explicit human review.
Exact-head CI must replay evidence-bundle construction deterministically.
